patches.find: Kernel of truth — what the API layer gets right
patches.replace:
Currently classified claims (mirror of api/current/claim_index.json, 2026-05-16)

The dome's api/current/claim_index.json publishes a per-claim taxonomy. As of 2026-05-16 the API surface lists 9 classified items — 7 WIN-mapped claims plus 2 prediction-keyed entries — out of 69+ wins total. We mirror the current state below; the table updates when the dome adds or modifies a classification.

Claim keyVisible labelAuthor's claim_classAuthor's statusregistry_integrity_notes flag
win-069-australia-scaffoldWIN-069retrospective_structuralconfirmed—
win-068-eclipse-ensembleWIN-068supportive_nonuniqueconfirmed—
win-058-bedrock-kappaWIN-058pending_contestedpending_independent_verificationyes (duplicate visible label)
win-058-theta-ruleWIN-058retrospective_structuralconfirmedyes (duplicate visible label)
win-011-mohe-contact-phaseWIN-011pending_contestedconfirmed_mechanism_contested—
win-056-solar-elevationWIN-056retrospective_structuralconfirmed—
win-062-tesla-wave-speedWIN-062retrospective_structuralconfirmedyes (duplicate visible label)
pred-eclipse-tier3PRED-ECLIPSE-TIER3prospective_confirmedprospective—
pred-solar-009PRED-SOLAR-009open_refinementopen_favors_globe—

Schema-drift note. An earlier audit (2026-04-18) proposed extending data/wins.json with five author_* fields and rendering an inline Author's Self-Rating block on every WIN card. Between then and this refresh, the dome's claim_index.json was restructured (entries → claims; strict_prospective_confirmed removed; registry_status → status). Two of the five proposed fields no longer have a source in the dome's API. We mirror the current taxonomy in this sub-table rather than carry 60+ null-default fields on WIN rows — the analytical thrust (visible-layer audit lag) is preserved; the implementation is leaner.

Kernel of truth — what the API layer gets right
